T1.name: 基础设施移植
T1.description: formatters, managers, widgets, event system 移植

T2.name: 对话中心主界面
T2.description: TuiState, render, event loop, engine 对接, approval, autocomplete, legacy cleanup

T3.name: 调试浮层 + 完善
T3.description: Ctrl+D/E/A overlays, welcome panel, thinking/progress rendering, theme validation, full test suite

phase_name: Phase T — TUI OpenDev 整合
key_decisions: 类型统一：直接使用 octo-types + AgentEvent，零适配层
布局：对话中心 + 浮层调试，废弃 12-Tab 多屏
对接：与 REPL 共用 AgentExecutorHandle
完整特性：无 mock/stub，全部真实 engine 数据
回退策略：feature branch 开发，每 Task 一个 commit
notes: Phase T COMPLETE (22a13ed): All 24/24 tasks done. T2-D1 autocomplete resolved (e6c5f0d). T3 overlays (agent_debug, eval, session_picker), welcome panel, thinking/progress verified, theme validated, 2259 workspace tests pass. Commits: e6c5f0d (T2-D1), 0050e07 (T3-1/2/3), c10d52b (T3-4/5), 22a13ed (T3-6).

deferred.description: Agent Skills 系统是否符合标准规范 — 专题研究
